allow: Bash(venv/bin/python -c "import mediapipe as mp; print\(dir\(mp.tasks\)\); print\(dir\(mp.tasks.vision\)\)")

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
from mediapipe.tasks.vision import HandLandmarker, HandLandmarkerOptions, RunningMode
from mediapipe.tasks import BaseOptions
print\('HandLandmarker OK'\)
print\(dir\(HandLandmarkerOptions\)\)
")

Bash(venv/bin/python -c "
import mediapipe as mp
v = mp.tasks.vision
print\(dir\(v.HandLandmarker\)\)
opts = v.HandLandmarkerOptions
print\(opts.__doc__\)
")
